case_title: GAMBIRAZIO, FREDDY VS SUP, CHOI KUN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GAMBIRAZIO, FREDDY AS TO DEFENDANT SUP, CHOI KUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
POS ON CIVIL SUBPENA TO S.F.P.D. LEGAL DEPARTMENT FILED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAMBIRAZIO, FREDDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUP, CHOI KUN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00, DEFT REPRESENTED BY HIS SON. PLTF STIPULATED TO SON'S APPEARANCE FOR FATHER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
